task_yaml.task:
Please open the video file:
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/clip.mp4

You must actually play, watch, and listen to the local video clip, then
transcribe it yourself. Do not download existing subtitles, scripts, movie
dialogue transcripts, or rely on movie knowledge; the final subtitles and
timeline must be based on this local video.

Please generate a subtitle file for this movie dialogue clip and save it as:
/tmp_workspace/results/clip.srt

Requirements:
1. Use standard SRT format
2. Split subtitles according to the actual speech; do not compress the whole
   passage into one very long subtitle block
3. After completing the first draft, watch the video again from the beginning
   and check whether the subtitles in the first 60 seconds have any timing
   misalignment
4. If you find problems, modify the SRT file directly
5. Finally, save /tmp_workspace/results/clip_notes.md describing which
   sections you focused on reviewing

If `/tmp_workspace/results/` does not exist, create it first.
